MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark McKeen, Esq. (415-615-6095) for Plaintiff/Moving party CALIFORNIA CORPORATE CENTER ACQUISITION, LLC.
James Wright, Esq. (415-227-3505) for Defendant/opposing party KCM Investment Advisors.

Both sides contest the tentative ruling on both motions. Both sides ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling on both motions as follows:

PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CORPORATE CENTER ACQUISITION, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Triable issue of fact exists regarding the existence of an option. Prevailing party to prepare order in accordance with CCP 437c(g).Prevailing party to submit order that tracks the tentative ruling and comply with CRC 3.1312(b). Plaintiff submits a proposed order.Judge: Newton J. Lam, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
